name: claudopilot
description: Claudopilot as a native Claude Code plugin — the dependency-graph roadmap runner, with the main session as the driver and phase work fanned out to background agents in git worktrees. No Docker, no separate CLI.

plugins.name: pilot
plugins.description: Native claudopilot: feed it a dependency-annotated roadmap and the main Claude session drives every eligible phase concurrently — each a background phase-worker agent in its own git worktree — merging green branches serially, owning the manifest, escalating red gates to a phase-supervisor. Project-agnostic.
